PROP-baseauction-pre-014.text: ERC20 approval from bidder to auction contract must cover assetOutAmount before bid.
PROP-baseauction-pre-014.assertion: ERC20(assetOut).allowance(msg.sender, this) >= assetOutAmount at safeTransferFrom time

locations.note: line 453: safeTransferFrom enforces allowance implicitly through ERC20 transfer semantics
